info.name: Weapons
info.description: Weapons from The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

element.name: Bullet
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. The Ammunition table lists the different types and the amount you get when you buy them. The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.

element.name: Cannonball
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. The Ammunition table lists the different types and the amount you get when you buy them. The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.

element.name: Flare
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. The Ammunition table lists the different types and the amount you get when you buy them. The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.

element.name: Shell
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. The Ammunition table lists the different types and the amount you get when you buy them. The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.

element.name: Shot
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. The Ammunition table lists the different types and the amount you get when you buy them. The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.

element.name: Blunderbuss
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_MARTIAL_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_HEAVY, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_LOADING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_TWOHANDED, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_SCATTER

description.p: This distinctive short-range firearm features a dramatically flared muzzle designed to launch shot in a wide spray. Most effective at close range, the Blunderbuss can be considered a precursor to the modern shotgun.

div.p: Scatter. Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with this weapon.

element.name: Double-Barrel Shotgun
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_SIMPLE_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RECOIL, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_2, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_TWOHANDED, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_SCATTER

description.p: A classic design with two loaded barrels, the Double-Barrel Shotgun trades ammo capacity and range for reliability and firepower.

div.p: Scatter. Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with this weapon.

element.name: Hunting Rifle
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_SIMPLE_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_4, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_TWOHANDED, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_SIGHTED

description.p: Designed for big game, Hunting Rifles are slow but accurate, requiring bolt action operation between every shot.

div.p: Sighted. Attacking at long range with this weapon doesn't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls. When you hit a creature with an attack using this weapon at long range, you can reroll any of the damage dice and must use the new roll.

element.name: Parlor Gun
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_SIMPLE_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_LIGHT, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_2, ID_WOTC_PHB24_WEAPON_PROPERTY_VEX

description.p: The smallest usable firearm, a Parlor Gun can be tucked into a stocking or hidden down a sleeve for two barrels of point-blank fire.

div.p: Vex. If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

element.name: Revolver
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_SIMPLE_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RECOIL, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_6, ID_WOTC_PHB24_WEAPON_PROPERTY_SLOW

description.p: An iconic handgun, the Revolver stores six bullets in a rotating cylinder. This weapon is favored by Gunslingers for its reliability and stopping-power.

div.p: Slow. If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

element.name: Cannon
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_MARTIAL_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_FIRE, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_HEAVY, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_LOADING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_TWOHANDED, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_EXPLODE

description.p: Smoothbore, muzzleloading Cannons are common fixtures on pirate ships and defensive fortifications, capable of splintering wood and reducing stone to gravel with a thunderous boom. Larger siege weapons of this type exist, and require entire teams of operators to position, load, and fire.

div.p: Explode. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with an explosion from this weapon's projectile. This explosion is a 5-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within the weapon's normal range. Each creature within the Sphere makes a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Strength or Dexterity modifier and your Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes the weapon's damage, but don't add your ability modifier to that damage unless that modifier is negative. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. You can create an explosion only once per turn.

element.name: Gattling Gun
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_MARTIAL_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_HEAVY, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_40, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_TWOHANDED, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AUTOMATIC

description.p: Infamous for its rate of fire, the Gatling Gun rotates and fires six or more barrels in succession. This weapon is cumbersome, easily recognizable, and utterly terrifying.

div.p: Automatic. When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

element.name: Magnum
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_MARTIAL_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_HEAVY, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RECOIL, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_6, ID_WOTC_PHB24_WEAPON_PROPERTY_SLOW

description.p: Chambered for large-caliber bullets, Magnum revolvers pack the most kick possible into a single shot.

div.p: Slow. If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

element.name: Flare Gun
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_SIMPLE_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_FIRE, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_LOADING, ID_WOTC_PHB24_WEAPON_PROPERTY_SLOW

description.p: Less a firearm and more a survival tool, a Flare Gun fires a single white-hot flare, useful for distress signals and last-ditch-effort self defense.

div.p: Slow. If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

element.name: Handgun
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_SIMPLE_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_10, ID_WOTC_PHB24_WEAPON_PROPERTY_VEX

description.p: Portable, reliable, and with a generous magazine size, the Handgun is the go-to firearm for self-defense and law enforcement.

div.p: Vex. If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

element.name: Assault Rifle
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_MARTIAL_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_20, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_TWOHANDED, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AUTOMATIC

description.p: Combining a high rate of fire with rifle-grade ballistics, the Assault Rifle is a staple weapon for all modern militaries. Dozens of variants exist on this general design, but all share the traits of a flexible and formidable weapon.

div.p: Automatic. When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

element.name: Pump Shotgun
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_MARTIAL_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_HEAVY, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RECOIL, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_8, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_TWOHANDED, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_SCATTER

description.p: The Pump Shotgun's namesake is a distinctive sliding grip on the barrel which can be "pumped" to chamber a new round.

div.p: Scatter. Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with this weapon.

element.name: Sniper Rifle
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_MARTIAL_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_HEAVY, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_LOADING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_TWOHANDED, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_SIGHTED

description.p: An instrument of ranged precision, the Sniper Rifle can take shots from distant, nearly invisible ranges.

div.p: Sighted. Attacking at long range with this weapon doesn't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls. When you hit a creature with an attack using this weapon at long range, you can reroll any of the damage dice and must use the new roll.

element.name: Submachine Gun
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_MARTIAL_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_LIGHT, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_16, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AUTOMATIC

description.p: Firing lighter, easier to control rounds, the Submachine Gun is an effective alternative to larger automatic weapons.

div.p: Automatic. When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

element.name: Firearm
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You don't add your ability modifier to the weapon's damage, unless otherwise stated. Firearm ammunition is destroyed upon use.

element.name: Recoil
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: After you make an attack with this weapon, you can't make ranged attacks beyond the weapon's normal range until the end of the current turn.

element.name: Reload (2)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You can make a limited number of shots with a Reload weapon. You must then reload the weapon as an action or a Bonus Action.

element.name: Reload (4)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You can make a limited number of shots with a Reload weapon. You must then reload the weapon as an action or a Bonus Action.

element.name: Reload (6)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You can make a limited number of shots with a Reload weapon. You must then reload the weapon as an action or a Bonus Action.

element.name: Reload (8)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You can make a limited number of shots with a Reload weapon. You must then reload the weapon as an action or a Bonus Action.

element.name: Reload (10)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You can make a limited number of shots with a Reload weapon. You must then reload the weapon as an action or a Bonus Action.

element.name: Reload (16)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You can make a limited number of shots with a Reload weapon. You must then reload the weapon as an action or a Bonus Action.

element.name: Reload (20)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You can make a limited number of shots with a Reload weapon. You must then reload the weapon as an action or a Bonus Action.

element.name: Reload (40)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You can make a limited number of shots with a Reload weapon. You must then reload the weapon as an action or a Bonus Action.

element.name: Gattling Gun (Automatic)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Martial, Ranged

description.p: When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

sheet.description: When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

element.name: Assault Rifle (Automatic)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Martial, Ranged

description.p: When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

sheet.description: When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

element.name: Submachine Gun (Automatic)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Martial, Ranged

description.p: When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

sheet.description: When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

element.name: Automatic
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: When you make an attack with this weapon, you can choose to make two attacks instead. These attacks are always made with Disadvantage, regardless of circumstance. You can't replace these attacks. If this weapon has Ammunition, these attacks use twice the normal amount of ammunition.

element.name: Cannon (Explode)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Martial, Ranged

description.p: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with an explosion from this weapon's projectile. This explosion is a 5-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within the weapon's normal range. Each creature within the Sphere makes a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Strength or Dexterity modifier and your Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes the weapon's damage, but don't add your ability modifier to that damage unless that modifier is negative. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. You can create an explosion only once per turn.

sheet.description: You can replace one of your attacks with an explosion from this weapon's projectile. This explosion is a 5-ft-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within the weapon's normal range. Each creature within the Sphere makes a DC{{tgcvss:weapon mastery explode:dc}} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes the weapon's damage, but don't add your ability modifier to that damage unless that modifier is negative. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage.

element.name: Explode
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with an explosion from this weapon's projectile. This explosion is a 5-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within the weapon's normal range. Each creature within the Sphere makes a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Strength or Dexterity modifier and your Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes the weapon's damage, but don't add your ability modifier to that damage unless that modifier is negative. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. You can create an explosion only once per turn.

element.name: Blunderbuss (Scatter)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Martial, Ranged

description.p: Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with this weapon.

sheet.description: Being within 5 ft of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with this weapon.

element.name: Double-Barrel Shotgun (Scatter)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Simple, Ranged

description.p: Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with this weapon.

sheet.description: Being within 5 ft of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with this weapon.

element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with this weapon.

element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with this weapon.

description.p: Attacking at long range with this weapon doesn't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls. When you hit a creature with an attack using this weapon at long range, you can reroll any of the damage dice and must use the new roll.

sheet.description: Attacking at long range with this weapon doesn't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls. When you hit a creature with an attack using this weapon at long range, you can reroll any of the damage dice and must use the new roll.

description.p: Attacking at long range with this weapon doesn't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls. When you hit a creature with an attack using this weapon at long range, you can reroll any of the damage dice and must use the new roll.

sheet.description: Attacking at long range with this weapon doesn't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls. When you hit a creature with an attack using this weapon at long range, you can reroll any of the damage dice and must use the new roll.

description.p: Attacking at long range with this weapon doesn't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls. When you hit a creature with an attack using this weapon at long range, you can reroll any of the damage dice and must use the new roll.

element.name: Revolver (Slow)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Simple, Ranged

description.p: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

sheet.description: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 ft until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 ft.

element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Martial, Ranged

description.p: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

sheet.description: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 ft until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 ft.

element.name: Flare Gun (Slow)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Simple, Ranged

description.p: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.

sheet.description: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its Speed by 10 ft until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the Speed reduction doesn't exceed 10 ft.

description.p: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

sheet.description: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon Mastery, Simple, Ranged

description.p: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

sheet.description: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

element.name: Weapon Proficiency (Double-Barrel Shotgun)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Weapon, Simple, Ranged, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_FIREARM, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_SIMPLE_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_PIERCING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_AMMUNITION, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_FIREARM, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RECOIL, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_RELOAD_2, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_TWOHANDED, ID_MHP_TGCVSS_WEAPON_PROPERTY_SCATTER

element.name: Kensei Weapon (Double-Barrel Shotgun)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Kensei Weapon, Ranged

description.p: You gain proficiency with the Double-Barrel Shotgun if you don’t already have it, and it is a monk weapon for you.

element.name: Kensei Weapon (Hunting Rifle)
element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Kensei Weapon, Ranged

description.p: You gain proficiency with the Hunting Rifle if you don’t already have it, and it is a monk weapon for you.

element.source: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets
element.supports: Kensei Weapon, Ranged

description.p: You gain proficiency with the Parlor Gun if you don’t already have it, and it is a monk weapon for you.

element.supports: Kensei Weapon, Ranged

description.p: You gain proficiency with the Revolver if you don’t already have it, and it is a monk weapon for you.

element.supports: Kensei Weapon, Ranged

description.p: You gain proficiency with the Flare Gun if you don’t already have it, and it is a monk weapon for you.
